desc: In src/index.js, the memoize(fn) wrapper's makeKey helper builds the cache key from only the first argument (String(args[0])), so calls with different trailing arguments collide and wrongly return a stale cached result. Fix makeKey so the cache key is derived from ALL of the call's arguments (e.g. args.map(String).join('|')), so tests/memoize.test.ts passes.
